themes.exampleQuote: The best sushi I have tried in Pittsburgh. One of the best sushi experiences I have ever had overall.
The price is on the higher end, but is justified by the quality of the food.
Can get busy in the evenings.
A wonderful sushi place with a clearly expert chef. Classic sushi done with a modern style.
For the service, I cannot give a positive review.
Really amazing drinks and dessert as well.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently rave about Mola's top-tier sushi quality and skilled chef, while flagging high prices and occasional service issues as areas that temper an otherwise outstanding experience.
notable_quote: The best sushi I have tried in Pittsburgh. One of the best sushi experiences I have ever had overall.
